response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "Creating a personal social media account will help you to manage your social media experience. With a personal account, you can customize your news feed to remove or block any content that promotes false information. Moreover, by utilizing the reporting feature on each platform, you can report any false information immediately. However, it's important to be cautious when using social media and verify the authenticity of any information before sharing it with others. Additionally, fact-checking websites such as Snopes or FactCheck.org can also help in identifying fake news. By following these simple steps, you can protect yourself from false content on social media."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: Creating a personal social media account will help you to manage your social media experience. With a personal account, you can customize your news feed to remove or block any content that promotes false information. Moreover, by utilizing the reporting feature on each platform, you can report any false information immediately. However, it's important to be cautious when using social media and verify the authenticity of any information before sharing it with others. Additionally, fact-checking websites such as Snopes or FactCheck.org can also help in identifying fake news. By following these simple steps, you can protect yourself from false content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is recommended to create a personal account, customize the news feed to remove or block false information, report any false information immediately using the reporting feature on each platform, be cautious when using social media, verify the authenticity of any information before sharing it with others, and use fact-checking websites such as Snopes or FactCheck.org. By following these steps, individuals can protect themselves from false content on social media.
